# RQ1 — Ablation A1: cost-critic necessity (raw/RCPO vs learned Q^c)

**Auto-generated by `a1_costsource_driver.ps1` -> `analyze_a1_costsource.py`** (detached). NUMBERS ONLY; operator cross-checks raw `.mat`. CRITIC = ours (Canonical_ep600 PID, == `--cost_source critic`); RAW = RCPO-style (`--cost_source raw`). Canonical metric: worst-platoon `(AoI_evolution>tau).mean(axis=(1,2)).max()`.

## 1. Per seed: worst-platoon viol / net-mean / osc-late-std / power

| seed | CRITIC worst | RAW worst | CRITIC net | RAW net | CRITIC osc-std | RAW osc-std | CRITIC pow | RAW pow |
|---|---|---|---|---|---|---|---|---|
| 2 | 0.138 | 0.157 | 0.099 | 0.115 | 0.125 | 0.160 | 11.32 | 11.13 |
| 3 | 0.165 | 0.104 | 0.115 | 0.081 | 0.168 | 0.179 | 13.77 | 13.07 |
| 4 | 0.115 | 0.109 | 0.099 | 0.102 | 0.057 | 0.107 | 8.86 | 7.92 |
| 5 | 0.119 | 0.108 | 0.101 | 0.101 | 0.071 | 0.058 | 8.45 | 7.13 |
| 6 | 0.125 | 0.109 | 0.095 | 0.097 | 0.093 | 0.154 | 8.01 | 8.27 |
| 7 | 0.095 | 0.129 | 0.080 | 0.112 | 0.115 | 0.185 | 9.14 | 9.10 |

## 2. Pooled (seeds 2-7, mean +- sample-SD)

| metric | CRITIC (ours) | RAW (RCPO) | RAW - CRITIC |
|---|---|---|---|
| worst-platoon viol | 0.126+-0.024 | 0.120+-0.020 | -0.007 |
| worst-platoon osc-std | 0.105+-0.040 | 0.141+-0.049 | +0.036 |
| mean power (dBm) | 9.924+-2.205 | 9.437+-2.245 | -0.486 |

- worst-CASE seed: CRITIC 0.165 vs RAW 0.157
- RAW worse (higher worst) on 2/6 seeds; RAW noisier (higher osc-std) on 5/6 seeds.

(Reading: RAW worse/noisier -> the separate learned cost critic Q^c is necessary, keep (c) in the method figure. RAW == CRITIC -> demote (c) to an inherited implementation detail.)

## 3. Reproduce
```
python results_remote/scripts/analyze_a1_costsource.py
```
